item.title: 48-Hour Career Makeover 🚀 • Revamp your résumé: Add quantifiable results. • Research 3 companies you love; note key values. • Practice STAR method: Situation, Task, Action, Result. • Record a mock interview to refine your responses. • Use: “I improved efficiency by 30% through X strategy.” What new insight or skill will you highlight in your next interview? #career #interview #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
item.description: 48-Hour Career Makeover 🚀 • Revamp your résumé: Add quantifiable results. • Research 3 companies you love; note key values. • Practice STAR method: Situation, Task, Action, Result. • Record a mock interview to refine your responses. • Use: “I improved efficiency by 30% through X strategy.” What new insight or skill will you highlight in your next interview? #career #interview #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
